item.description:
# CodexMate 0.0.10
- Fixed menu bar status updates so running, waiting-for-user, and unread states refresh even before the menu is opened. - Improved live thread tracking from Codex app-server notifications, including thread starts, item starts, completions, errors, name updates, and server-request resolution. - Kept removed or archived project threads out of the menu while still preserving newly created unmatched threads during project-catalog catch-up. - Fixed UTC desktop log date lookup so activity around local midnight is detected from the correct Codex log folder. - Added regression coverage for stale project removal, unmatched project grace handling, status snapshots, and UTC log scanning.
